source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Faster Shooting
upgrades.description: All weapons on board shoot faster.

upgrades.name: Aircraft Carrier
upgrades.description: Launches waves of fighter planes that strafe their targets and fire missiles at MOAB class Bloons.

upgrades.name: Carrier Flagship
upgrades.description: Does extra damage. Can place other Monkeys on the upper decks of the ship and increases attack speed of all water based Monkeys and Monkey Aces.

upgrades.name: Grape Shot
upgrades.description: Adds a spray of 5 sharpened grapes to the ship.

upgrades.name: Hot Shot
upgrades.description: Burning hot grape shot can pop Lead Bloons and set Bloons on fire.

upgrades.name: Cannon Ship
upgrades.description: Adds a powerful cannon that shoots out powerful bombs.

upgrades.name: Monkey Pirates
upgrades.description: Adds 2 cannons to the ship and attacks do more damage. MOAB Takedown Ability: harpoons a MOAB class Bloon and brings it down.

upgrades.name: Pirate Lord
upgrades.description: Greatly improved power and can shoot many grappling hooks at once, plundering extra cash from each MOAB-class Bloon taken down.

upgrades.name: Long Range
upgrades.description: Much longer range, and projectiles fly faster and pierce more.

upgrades.name: Crow's Nest
upgrades.description: Allows the ship to hit Camo Bloons.

upgrades.name: Merchantman
upgrades.description: Generates cash each round automatically, and deals more damage when over 10,000 saved cash.

upgrades.name: Favored Trades
upgrades.description: Attacks faster and deals more damage when over 50,000 saved cash. Generates lots of money per round. Monkeys in radius have increased sell value.

upgrades.name: Trade Empire
upgrades.description: Generates more cash per round. Grants up to 20 Merchantmen bonus damage and an income bonus that increases with every Merchantman owned up to 20 times.
